title: ICSI's First Bi-annual Eastern Region Convocation Kicks Off in Guwahati Today!
content:
# ICSI's First Bi-annual Eastern Region Convocation Kicks Off in Guwahati Today!

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) ne apni pehli bi-annual Eastern Region Convocation announce ki thi, jo aaj, 6th June, 2026 ko Guwahati mein ho rahi hai.

*   **Event:** ICSI First Bi-annual Eastern Region Convocation of FY 2026-2027.
*   **Date:** Saturday, 6th June, 2026.
*   **Venue:** Pragjyoti ITA Cultural Centre, Guwahati, Assam.
*   **Purpose:** This convocation aims to award membership certificates to Associate and Fellow members who were admitted between October 1, 2025, and March 31, 2026. Additionally, prizes/medals will be awarded to meritorious students (National) and certificates to PMQ awardees.
*   **Important Note:** Eligible members were required to confirm their participation online by May 14, 2026. On-the-spot registration was not permitted. Attendance at the convocation is mandatory for receiving certificates; otherwise, certificates will be dispatched by post, and members will not be allowed to participate in future convocations. Participants are also required to adhere to a prescribed Indian dress code and bring valid identity proof for entry.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icsi.edu/whats-new-icsi/)

*Published on: 6 June 2026*
